airflow:dagaccessentity.description: Filters access by the DAG sub-resource being accessed

airflow:resourceaction.description: Filters access by the action being performed on the Airflow resource

airflow:resourceid.description: Filters access by the identifier of the specific Airflow resource, such as a DAG ID or connection ID

airflow:resourcetype.description: Filters access by the Airflow resource type specified in the request

airflow:teamname.description: Filters access by the team name associated with the caller's identity, enabling team-based access control for Airflow resources

aws:requesttag/${tagkey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:resourcetag/${tagkey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:tagkeys.description: Filters access by tag keys in the request
